summary: Completed testing of xicon-style chat page redesign. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All chat page features working correctly - xicon-style layout with avatar (M letter), MIRO.CARE name, online dot, TTS toggle, message bubbles (user right-aligned with glass backdrop, AI left-aligned with dark background), speaker button on AI messages, mic button, input field with blue border, send button, back button navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Xicon-style chat CSS properly implemented with xc- prefix (xc-chat-modal, xc-chat-header, xc-chat-messages, etc.)
Avatar circle with M letter and online dot correctly positioned in header
TTS toggle button works correctly (toggles between Volume2/VolumeX icons)
Message bubbles styled correctly: user messages right-aligned with glass backdrop and blue border, AI messages left-aligned with dark background
Speaker button present on AI messages for TTS playback
Input area has round mic button, input field with blue border, and round send button
Wave visualizer SVG animation defined for voice recording mode
Running text (marquee) animation defined for speech recognition feedback
Minor ESLint warning in ChatPage.jsx line 124: useCallback missing 'handleSend' dependency - not critical
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Xicon-style chat page redesign verified. All features working: header with avatar (M letter), MIRO.CARE name, online dot, TTS toggle; message bubbles with correct styling (user right-aligned glass, AI left-aligned dark); speaker button on AI messages; input area with mic button, input field with blue border, send button. Navigation flow: Landing -> Problems -> Voice Select -> Chat. Back button navigates to /problems. All existing pages (Landing, Auth, Problems, Voice Select) still working.
